name: mcp-hook-bridge-convention
tags: mcp hook bridge generic posttooluse additionalSystemPrompt injection open-closed factory pattern task:e766dad2
body:
MCP tools signal hook injection via a `__hook__` key in their response. `McpHookBridgeNode` pipes it to `pending_hook_output`. Zero claude-hooks code changes needed per new integration.

**Why:** Named-tool routing in _post_tool_route violates open/closed — every new MCP project requires a claude-hooks code change. Content-based routing on `__hook__` makes claude-hooks pure infrastructure.

**How to apply:** In any MCP tool response, return `{"__hook__": {"additionalSystemPrompt": "..."}}`. The bridge fires automatically. Named lifecycle tools (tasks__*) still take priority in routing — __hook__ check is the fallback.
